hero.subtitle: The science behind TikTok's algorithm and why creation velocity is the ultimate growth hack for music artists

intro.title: 🎵 Why Video Creations Are Everything
intro.paragraph: Video Creations (User-Generated Content with your song) are the most important ranking factor for musical success on TikTok. Here's the technical breakdown of how TikTok's algorithm works and why mass posting changes the game.

phase1.title: Phase 1: Initial Test Pool
phase1.point1: New creation video is shown to 300-500 random users
phase1.point2: If engagement rate > 8% → advances to Phase 2

phase2.title: Phase 2: Interest Graph Expansion
phase2.point1: Video is shown to users who like similar sounds/hashtags
phase2.point2: With each positive signal (Like, Share, Creation) → broader distribution
phase2.point3: Songs with many creations have higher starting chance in Phase 2

phase3.title: Phase 3: Viral Explosion
phase3.point1: When critical thresholds are exceeded (e.g., 10.000 creations in 24h)
phase3.point3: Song is actively pushed in "Trending Sounds" section

velocity.title: Creation Velocity as Ranking Factor
velocity.intro: TikTok doesn't just measure total count, but
velocity.insight: 💡 Why? TikTok wants to push current trends, not old ones.

creator_tiers.title: Creator Tier Weighting
creator_tiers.insight: 💡 One Charli D'Amelio creation = 50 normal user creations (algorithmically)

auto_features.title: Auto-Activated Features
auto_features.intro: At high creation counts, TikTok automatically activates:
auto_features.feature1: "Use This Sound" button becomes more prominent

timing.title: ⏱️ Timing Is Critical
timing.point1: 0-72 hours: First 1.000 creations determine viral potential
timing.point3: Month 1: If momentum fades, algorithm deprioritizes the song
timing.month1_desc: If momentum fades, algorithm deprioritizes the song

example.title: 💡 Real-World Example
example.result: 🎯 Result: Song became a world hit completely through TikTok creations, NOT through radio/label push.

soundon.title: 📊 TikTok SoundOn Engagement Rankings

soundon.advantage: 💡 MediaMass Advantage: With 250.000 videos we guarantee that your track massively exceeds the 5.000 views threshold and is catapulted into the Top 10% (Outstanding) rankings!
